changes.reason: Distinct high-value iCloud contacts, calendar, and reminders synchronization symptom cluster supported by current Mainland China Chinese Apple documentation.

queries: iCloud 通讯录 日历 提醒事项 不同步
iCloud contacts calendar reminders not syncing
通讯录没有同步 日历不显示 提醒事项不同步
site:support.apple.com/zh-cn iCloud 通讯录 日历 提醒事项
canonicalReview.notes: Reviewed all 78 canonical article titles, summaries, symptoms, aliases, devices, platforms, error messages, keywords, and full text on origin/main. The matched articles cover iCloud Photos synchronization and iCloud storage/backup failure, not iCloud Contacts, Calendar, or Reminders synchronization. No same-intent canonical exists. Used only accessible Mainland China Chinese Apple sources; no English fallback or community source was needed.
